name: fabric_a4mc_local_voxel_coupling
value: AerodynamicsWindCoupling maps trusted local L2 A4MC samples into obstacle residual, pressure-gradient disk wind, and shelter-gradient side obstruction.
note: Source inventory for the A4MC local-voxel coupling response packet.

name: drone_entity_disk_sampler
value: DroneEntity samples rotor center plus cardinal/diagonal disk-edge points, then applies the local voxel coupling before calling drone-sim-core.
note: Source inventory for the A4MC local-voxel coupling response packet.

name: a4mc_gameplay_sample
value: GameplayWindSample exposes source confidence, freshness, pressure anomaly, shelter, and local voxel authority used by this bridge.
note: Source inventory for the A4MC local-voxel coupling response packet.
